name: isolated-gate-evaluation
title: Rearchitect gate evaluation: every gate gets an isolated subagent evaluator (generator-evaluator separation), trust gradient controls human oversight of evaluator verdicts, shell pre-filters become trivial-step hints not decisions
description: Rearchitect gate evaluation: every gate gets an isolated subagent evaluator (generator-evaluator separation), trust gradient controls human oversight of evaluator verdicts, shell pre-filters become trivial-step hints not decisions

gates.evidence: Definition validated: 9 deliverables across 3 phases (foundation, integration, alignment). Cross-model review incorporated. Key decisions: isolated subagent evaluator for all gates, shell prepares/agent spawns pattern, three-value decided_by (manual|evaluated|prechecked), pre_step/post_step gate YAML structure, always pay subagent cost.

Research complete: 4 parallel agents investigated gate YAML schema design, Phase A extraction boundaries, caller inventory (8 critical runtime files, 23 doc references), and gate record format. Key discoveries: second schema in adapters/shared/, validate-summary.sh business logic on decided_by, gate_callback.py hardcodes evaluator. Definition updated with all missing files.

Plan complete: 6 waves, 9 deliverables across 3 phases. Key decisions: YAML prompt files, JSON Phase A handoff, single branch with phase-boundary commits, smoke test on script-rewire. Pre-step dimensions defined for all 4 eligible steps.

Specs complete: 6 spec files covering all 9 deliverables across 3 phases. Phase 1 has complete YAML file contents for 7 gate files plus evaluator template. Phase 2 has complete new scripts and exact line-level changes. Phase 3 has before/after text for all consumer files. Fixed review.yaml to use inline dimensions. All specs include verification checklists.

Decompose complete: 8 deliverables verified across 6 waves. team-plan.md written with phase-boundary commit strategy. Waves 2 and 5 have parallel agents. All file_ownership non-overlapping within waves.

Implementation complete: 34 files changed across 3 phases. Phase 1: 7 gate YAMLs + evaluator template. Phase 2: run-gate.sh, select-gate.sh, script renames, decided_by vocabulary migration. Phase 3: 8 skills + 2 protocols + 13 consumers updated. Final grep sweep confirms no stale references.
